title: Prioritize Startup ops leads
rationale: Startup ops leads has the strongest aggregate score (0.676) with mean confidence 0.426.

title: Lead with Pro monthly (v_pro)
rationale: Pro monthly (v_pro) leads on average weighted score (0.637) across segments.

title: Use q_interest as a segmentation lever
rationale: How likely would you be to try this product in the next 30 days? shows the largest cross-segment divergence (avg JS 0.028).

title: Track route reliability in pilot delivery
rationale: Fallbacks were triggered in 6.2% of question predictions, so project logs and retry monitoring should stay on.

title: Treat close calls as validation candidates
rationale: Higher-uncertainty or unstable questions should be converted into focused follow-up tests before committing large spend.
